subcodes.first_line: O pure and assured leaf, handmaid of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, render thanks unto God, that thou art beneath the protection of His servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مطمئنه امه الله المهیمن القیوم شکر کن خدا را که در تحت عصمت بنده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
